data.body: FINAL STATE (session 2 end) — HANDOFF READY. Epic 88ab: 5/7 stories closed+signed (S1/S2/S3/S4 + 8903). S3 will-tile-plum CLOSED+signed (evidence file docs/88ab-feature-branch-evidence.md landed via change 239; completion verifier requires COMMITTED evidence artifact, not just comments — important for S5). fern-belief-gap CLOSED+signed (change 236). REMAINING OPEN: S5 leafy-vogue-ingot (unblocked), S6 norm-dam-swab, follow-ups spy-luge-wool (bug) + sly-sloth-bay (409-guard task, discovered_from S2). GERRIT CLEANUP: abandoned stale/throwaway changes 215 (AC4 experiment), 222/223/224 (superseded by merged 229/230/231), 196 (old S2 smoke), 233/234 (AC4 probes). No dangling changes of mine remain; open 241-246 are ANOTHER session's reconciler work (241 'ADR 0026-0029' collides with merged ADR 0026 autodeploy — they must renumber). Durable handoff summary added as a comment on epic elfish-chair-lug. Box: auto-deploy LIVE, review-bot=S2, gerrit untouched, deploy_errors alarm applied.
